description: Universal Health Realty Income Trust, a real estate investment trust, invests in healthcare and human service-related facilities including acute care hospitals, behavioral healthcare facilities, rehabilitation hospitals, sub-acute care facilities, surgery centers, childcare centers, and medical office buildings. The Trust has seventy-seven investments in twenty-one states. It is based in King of Prussia, Pennsylvania. Universal Health Realty Income Trust was incorporated in 1986 in Maryland.
